assignments.name: Assign_Baseline_Initial_EPC_Ending_Fields
assignments.label: Assign Baseline Initial EPC Ending Fields

assignments.name: Assign_Baseline_initial_EPC_Starting_fields
assignments.label: Assign Baseline initial EPC Starting fields

assignments.name: Assign_baseline_values_to_draft_change_control_request_SP
assignments.label: Assign baseline values to draft change control request

formulas.description: this is just a list of all the different fields that can be changed and checks whether the new and old values are the same, if any of them differ returns true if they are all the same returns false
formulas.name: flaHasNoChanges

Flow.interviewLabel: GMS - Change Control Request Form - Baselines No Award {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GMS - Change Control Request Form - Baselines No Award

fields.name: GuidanceCfStartingEPC
fields.fieldText:
Starting EPCs 

In the table below, you should see a list of your approved Phase Requests. Please complete the table below if you wish to request a change to the starting EPC of any homes within these phases.  

  

Please be reminded that: 

  • You do not need to submit a Project Change Request to amend these figures for unapproved, future phases as long as total project homes upgraded and total project number of homes upgraded to EPC C remains unchanged.

fields.name: GuidanceCfEndingEPC
fields.fieldText:
Ending EPCs 

In the table below, you should see a list of your approved Phase Requests. Please complete the table below if you wish to request a change to the ending EPC of any homes within these phases.  

  

Please be reminded that: 

  • You do not need to submit a Project Change Request to amend these figures for unapproved, future phases as long as total project homes upgraded and total project number of homes upgraded to EPC C remains unchanged.

textTemplates.name: txtBaselineEPCBreached
textTemplates.text: The sum of Ending EPC A - C must be greater than Starting EPC D, invalid baselines include:{!varBaselinesBreachedNames}
